compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CLOUDLINE T4, CLOUDLINE T6, AIRLIFT S6
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature/humidity-triggered speed adjustment, schedule, cycle, timer
compatible_devices.notes: Controls up to 2 devices with shared programming (not independent); Molex connector native; Bluetooth-only app; newer UIS-connector versions of these fan series require UIS-to-Molex adapter dongle (sold separately); no grow light or climate device support

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CLOUDRAY A4, CLOUDRAY A6, CLOUDRAY S4
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: UIS to Molex Port Adapter Dongle
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature/humidity-triggered speed adjustment, schedule, cycle, timer
compatible_devices.notes: CLOUDRAY uses UIS connectors; UIS-to-Molex adapter required to connect to Controller 67's Molex port; counts toward the 2-device shared-programming limit
